name: PT Transportasi Gas Indonesia
message:
Dear customers!

We are pleased to offer exclusive access to over 180 GB of confidential data from PT Transportasi Gas Indonesia TGI, a leading natural gas transportation company in Indonesia. Established in 2002 as a joint venture with PT Perusahaan Gas Negara PGN, TGI operates an extensive 1,000 kilometer pipeline network serving both domestic and international markets, including key routes from Grissik to Duri and Grissik to Singapore. With a transportation capacity of up to 465 million standard cubic feet per day MMSCFD, TGI is dedicated to operational safety, environmental stewardship, and community engagement.

Operating in strict compliance with Good Corporate Governance GCG and Health, Safety, Security, and Environment HSSE standards, TGI regularly upgrades its infrastructure, working with certified waste management providers to minimize environmental impact. The company is also active in Corporate Social Responsibility CSR programs and has been recognized with awards for its commitment to safety and community initiatives.

This comprehensive data pack includes:

Employee data personal details, dates of birth, ID copies including passports, health insurance cards, tax IDs
Client information contact details, service agreements
Contracts and commercial agreements
Insurance policies health and liability insurance
Financial and accounting records bank statements, payment invoices, credit and debit records, financial movement reports
Executive financial statements and reports
Safety management procedures
Job descriptions and medical information
And much more
These records provide in-depth insights into PT Transportasi Gas Indonesias operations, valuable to professionals in energy transportation, corporate governance, and business analysis.

To access this exclusive 180 GB data pack, click the Buy button and provide your contact details for registration. Our team will guide you through a secure and confidential transaction.

Dont miss the opportunity to explore detailed information from PT Transportasi Gas Indonesia TGI with this exclusive data pack!
